feed.description: Mountain biking talk: trails, technique, gear, and the people who build the ride.
feed.title: Singletrack Sessions

bullets: Today we're talking about enduro racing, and I'm joined by Sophie Lorenz, enduro racer and coach.
Sophie Lorenz, thanks for being here.
Today's episode is sponsored by Linear.
